leagueBriefing: Conference tournament Saturday delivered a mix of dominant defense and high-stakes drama. Duke and Arizona cemented their status as national heavyweights by securing tournament titles, while St. John's made a massive statement by routing UConn. Meanwhile, Vanderbilt and Arkansas set up a high-octane SEC final after a pair of emotional semifinal victories.

games.headline: Duke goes back-to-back as Boozer and Evans outlast Virginia's stingy defense
games.brief: Duke proved why they are likely headed for the top overall seed, surviving a physical, low-possession battle against Virginia to repeat as ACC champions. Isaiah Evans led the way with 20 points, but it was the collective grit of the Boozer twins and a late-game surge that finally broke the Cavaliers' defensive wall. Virginia took a lead early in the second half, but the Blue Devils found enough scoring punch in the closing minutes to win their second straight conference title.
bullets: Isaiah Evans paced the Blue Devils with 20 points in a high-intensity final.
Cayden Boozer matched his career high with 16 points for the second straight game.
Virginia's Ugonna Onyenso set a tournament record for blocks over a three-game stretch.
Duke becomes the first team to win consecutive ACC tournament titles since 2011.
games.context: Duke bolsters its case for the No. 1 overall seed in the NCAA Tournament.

games.headline: Arizona weather's Houston's late surge to claim inaugural Big 12 tournament crown
games.brief: In a battle of titans, Arizona secured its first-ever Big 12 tournament championship by holding off a furious Houston comeback. The Wildcats built a comfortable lead, but the Cougars' suffocating defense sparked a seven-minute scoring drought for Arizona that brought the game within a single point. Ultimately, a clutch banked-in three-pointer by Kharchenkov and steady free-throw shooting allowed the Wildcats to celebrate in Kansas City.
bullets: Arizona ended a seven-minute scoring drought in the second half to secure the win.
The Wildcats captured the title in their first year as members of the Big 12.
Houston trailed by as much as double digits before a late run cut the lead to 59-58.
Kharchenkov's late banked three-pointer proved to be the dagger for the Cougars.
games.context: Arizona secures an automatic bid and likely a top-two seed in the Big Dance.

games.headline: Vanderbilt's high-powered offense shreds Florida to reach SEC finals
games.brief: Playing just two miles from their own campus, the Vanderbilt Commodores turned Bridgestone Arena into a home-court masterpiece. Vandy’s elite offense simply overwhelmed Florida’s top-ranked defense, using a 13-0 first-half run to take control and never looking back. Tyler Tanner led a balanced attack as the Commodores snapped Florida's 12-game winning streak in a statement win that has Nashville buzzing.
bullets: Tyler Tanner led five Commodores in double figures with 20 points and seven assists.
Vanderbilt shot a blistering 54.5% from the field and 47.6% from three.
The loss was the most lopsided of the season for the No. 4-ranked Gators.
Vandy's bench outscored Florida's reserves 26-8 in the blowout.
games.context: Vanderbilt advances to the SEC final with a chance to secure an automatic bid.

highlights.title: #4 Florida vs Vanderbilt Highlights | Men's Basketball | College Basketball 2026

games.headline: Red Storm repeat as Big East kings after dismantling UConn at the Garden
games.brief: Madison Square Garden belonged to St. John's on Saturday night as the Red Storm dominated UConn from start to finish to claim their second straight Big East title. Led by Zuby Ejiofor, St. John's suffocated the Huskies' offense, holding them to just 52 points. It was a clinical performance that served notice to the rest of the country that the Red Storm are a force to be reckoned with heading into the NCAA Tournament.
bullets: Zuby Ejiofor was the catalyst for the Red Storm in the 20-point rout.
St. John's has now won back-to-back Big East tournament championships.
The Red Storm defense held UConn to a season-low 52 points.
This is St. John's first consecutive tournament title run in decades.
games.context: St. John's secures the Big East automatic bid and major momentum for March.

games.headline: Arkansas survives Ole Miss' upset bid in overtime thriller to reach SEC final
games.brief: Ole Miss nearly completed a legendary Cinderella run, but Arkansas had just enough left in the tank to survive a frantic SEC semifinal in overtime. After AJ Storr forced the extra period with a last-second layup, Arkansas took control in OT but had to sweat out a missed potential game-tying three at the buzzer. Meleek Thomas was the hero for the Hogs, scoring 29 points to set up a championship date with Vanderbilt.
bullets: Meleek Thomas led the Razorbacks with 29 points in the overtime victory.
Ole Miss’ AJ Storr forced OT with a banked layup with one second left in regulation.
The Rebels were aiming for their fourth upset in four days after a 15-20 regular season.
Arkansas dominated the glass, outrebounding Ole Miss 44-31.
games.context: Arkansas moves on to face Vanderbilt in a battle of high-scoring SEC offenses.

highlights.title: SEC Tournament: Ole Miss Rebels vs. Arkansas Razorbacks | Full Game Highlights | ESPN CBB

games.headline: Cluff's double-double powers Purdue past shorthanded Bruins into Big Ten final
games.brief: Purdue capitalized on a depleted UCLA roster to advance to the Big Ten championship game, holding off a valiant Bruin comeback in Chicago. Oscar Cluff was a monster inside, tallying 17 points and 14 rebounds as the Boilermakers pulled away late. UCLA, playing without star Tyler Bilodeau and losing Donovan Dent early to injury, managed to tie the game late, but Purdue's execution in the final three minutes sealed the victory.
bullets: Oscar Cluff dominated with 17 points and 14 rebounds for the Boilermakers.
UCLA was forced to play without leading scorer Tyler Bilodeau (knee).
The Bruins lost point guard Donovan Dent to a calf strain early in the first half.
Purdue closed the game on a 13-6 run after UCLA tied it at 60-60.
games.context: Purdue advances to face Michigan for the Big Ten tournament title.

highlights.title: Purdue vs. UCLA | HIGHLIGHTS | 2026 Big Ten Men's Basketball Tournament | 03/14/26
